title: Race Day Warm-Up (Time Trial)
description: Peak activation for maximal sustained effort
purpose: Peak activation for maximal sustained effort

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 7:00 at 65%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/5. 65% FTP, Seated. 7:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 65% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 65% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 26% complete. 16 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 7 minutes of Z2 work. 90-95 rpm, Aero. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This easy work is the foundation. 75%, Aero. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% for 3:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. 75% FTP. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/6. 2:00 at 88%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 88% FTP, Aero. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10 minutes of work done. 14 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/6. 88% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% into session. 88%, 90-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 12 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 1:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 49% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 12 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 13 minutes in. 100% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 49% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 3 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 49% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 49% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 1:30. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 1:30 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 1:30 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 1:30 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 59% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 115% for 30s. Next up: 2:00 recovery, then 0min at 150%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 59% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 59% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. 115% for 30s. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 16 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 16 minutes of work done. 8 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/6. 18 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5. 6min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 5/6. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 1 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 69% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 69% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 18 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 5 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 65% for 3:00. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 55-65% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 3:00 at 65%. Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 80% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. 65% for 3:00. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 92% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 80-90 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 92% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 92% into session. 55%, 80-90 rpm. Focus and execute.
